questionHtml:
Diego is a teacher in the school. He believes that the number of students, n, who have had influenza during the first t days of the school year, can be modelled by the function

nt=250-2402kt, k∈ℝ.

Calculate the number of students who did not have headlice or influenza or chickenpox.
markschemeHtml:
35+4+20+3+1+2+5          (M1)

430          A1

 

Note: The 430 may be seen in the Venn diagram.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the number of students who did not have headlice or influenza or chickenpox.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.6—Combined, mutually exclusive, conditional, independence, prob diagrams
